posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
On Thursday, May 20, Fredrik and Thomas are going to host Omnitas next webinar about our most commonly used apps in monday.com when building solutions for our clients.

image1800×940 210 KB

In this webinar you will get an overview of our most beloved apps and how to use them. We will walk you through the basic functions, usability and our recommendations in efficiency use cases.

Some of the apps we will feature:

  • DocuGen
  • Rollup Multiple boards
  • Item Card
  • Communihub
  • Conversastions App

You will have the opportunity to learn everything there is to know about the apps that makes monday.com into a comprehensive Work OS with optimized workflows.

Register today and save your seat

Registration link

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Honorable mention to @samicaracand from Docugen and @basdebruin who created RMB as well as a full suit of apps.
